top500.disclaimer: TOP500 figures are from the published November 2024 list (© top500.org). This project is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by TOP500. The network figure is an independent order-of-magnitude estimate from advertised capacity — not a LINPACK measurement.

extra.method: sequential memcpy for bandwidth; dependent pointer chase over a buffer larger than cache for latency

extra.iops_caveat: 4 KiB random reads against a file just written, so the page cache is warm; this measures the filesystem path, not a cold device
extra.storage_class: solid state: no seek penalty, so the random-read figure is close to the sequential one
